_source: CHEP USA GMA B48 block pallet spec (48x40 stringer-less block style), public spec sheet 2023. Dimensions rounded to nearest mm.

topDeck._note: 7 boards running the 40-inch direction, total length 48 in. Gaps produce the characteristic top deck.

bottomDeck._note: 5 boards running the 40-inch direction (chamfered for pallet-jack entry).

blocks._note: 9 blocks: 4 corner, 4 edge-center, 1 pallet-center. Blocks are between top and bottom deck.

friction_painted_wood.note: CHEP pallets are painted blue; paint slightly reduces μ vs bare wood. Carton-on-painted-wood nominal.
